variants: Born in Lindenbee Rest, Brynn Harrington has become a well-respected figure in cartography, currently residing in Pinequartz Point. Additionally, Brynn is an enthusiastic member of the Cobblestone Falconers Group, where she shares her passion for falconry with associates who share similar interests.

Outside of her professional pursuits, she is actively involved in the Cobblestone Falconers Group, engaging in the art of falconry with fellow enthusiasts.
